case_title: HONG LAI LAI VS. GARY FONG

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO APR-22-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAR-04-2015 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-22-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-18-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---VIVEN CHOY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER--VIVIAN CHOY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BY PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. CASE SETTLED. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---VIVIAN CHOY. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---BENJAMIN GIANG. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURNED MAIL: PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM MAILED CERTIFIED TO GARY FONG RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESED, UNABLE TO FOWARD.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LAI, HONG LAI AS TO DEFENDANT FONG, GARY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-04-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF LAI, HONG LAI
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAI, HONG LAI AS TO DEFENDANT FONG, GARY
